title: taraxacum dens-leonis subsp. gymnanthum
intro: Taraxacum dens-leonis subsp. gymnanthum, a lesser-known subspecies of the dandelion plant, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter compounds and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to support digestive health, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, among other health benefits. Taraxacum dens-leonis subsp. gymnanthum can be consumed as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, or used in traditional medicine preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
